steps.title: Find the passage focus
steps.content: The passage mentions Gus Edwards's play as an example, then explains how Douglas Turner Ward and Robert Hooks envisioned the Negro Ensemble Company and how NEC gave Black playwrights a forum for their stories.

steps.title: Reject detail-only purposes
steps.content: A overstates the role of A Raisin in the Sun. B treats Edwards's play as the focus, though it is only an example. C invents a changing partnership that the passage does not trace. The answer is D.
